enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Dependence on the vendors for day-to-day transactions shall be avoided.

Access to
production systems shall be provided to vendors only in a controlled environment, and
audit trail shall be maintained.
enriched_requirements.object: only in a controlled environment, and audit trail shall be maintained

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Security Incident and Event Management (SIEM) tool shall be integrated with the
concerned servers and consoles / PCs connected to electronic Guarantee related
critical systems directly in its VLAN to generate automatic alerts.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned servers and consoles / PCs connected to electronic Guarantee related critical systems directly in its VLAN to generat

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall integrate electronic Guarantee systems with Privileged User
Management Systems / Identity and Access Management systems.
enriched_requirements.object: with Privileged User Management Systems / Identity and Access Management systems

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The logs of the
same shall be monitored through Security Operation Centre (SOC) setup.
enriched_requirements.object: Operation Centre (SOC) setup

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Business Continuity Measures and contingency plans for system failures, shall be put
in place by the AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: by the AIFI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall not provide a guarantee favouring another RE to enable it to provide
any fund based credit facility to an obligor unless specifically permitted by RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: another RE to enable it to provide any fund based credit facility to an obligor unless specifically permitted by RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that this clause shall not be applicable in case of credit facilities extended
against guarantees pertaining to trade related transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: of credit facilities extended against guarantees pertaining to trade related transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the AIFI may provide a guarantee favouring another RE for a NFB facility
extended by the latter.
enriched_requirements.object: another RE for a NFB facility extended by the latter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such guarantee issued by the AIFI shall be treated as an
exposure on the obligor on whose behalf the guarantee has been issued by it, for all
purposes including for the calculation of capital adequacy.
enriched_requirements.object: exposure on the obligor on whose behalf the guarantee has been issued by it, for all purposes including for the calculation of capita

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The exposure of the RE
extending credit facility against a guarantee shall be treated as a claim / exposure on
the AIFI which is providing the counter guarantee.
enriched_requirements.object: claim / exposure on the AIFI which is providing the counter guarantee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Only genuine trade bills shall be co-accepted, and it shall be ensured that the goods
covered by bills co-accepted are actually received in the stock accounts of the
borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: shall be ensured that the goods covered by bills co-accepted are actually received in the stock accounts of the borrowers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Proper records of the bills co-accepted for each customer shall be maintained, so that
the commitments for each customer and the total commitments at a branch can be
readily ascertained, and these shall be part of internal audit.
enriched_requirements.object: the commitments for each customer and the total commitments at a branch can be readily ascertained, and these shall be part of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall not co-accept bills drawn by another RE or where the buyer / seller has
received funding for the underlying trade transaction from any RE
enriched_requirements.object: another RE or where the buyer / seller has received funding for the underlying trade transaction from any RE

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFIs permitted as Authorized Dealer (AD) may extend NFB facilities as permitted
under the extant regulations / Directions issued under Foreign Exchange Management
Act, 1999, for bonafide current or capital account transaction, including guarantees in
respect of debt or other liability incurred by an exporter on account of exports from
India.
enriched_requirements.object: permitted under the extant regulations / Directions issued under Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999, for bonafide current

conditions: Provided that such guarantees shall not be issued by banks
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that such guarantees shall not be issued by banks, including overseas
branches/ subsidiaries of Indian banks, for the purpose of raising loans/ advances of
any kind by the foreign entity except in connection with the ordinary course of business
overseas.
enriched_requirements.object: including overseas branches/ subsidiaries of Indian banks, for the purpose of raising loans/ advances of any kind by the foreign e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further while extending such guarantees, banks shall ensure effective
monitoring of the end use of such facilities and its conformity with the business needs
of such entities.
enriched_requirements.object: the end use of such facilities and its conformity with the business needs of such entities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
AIFIs may provide Partial Credit Enhancement (PCE) to bonds issued by corporates /
special purpose vehicles (SPVs) for funding all types of projects and to bonds issued
by Non-deposit taking NBFCs with asset size of ₹1,000 crore and above registered
with the Reserve Bank (including HFCs).
enriched_requirements.object: (PCE) to bonds issued by corporates / special purpose vehicles (SPVs) for funding all types of projects and to bond

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCE may also be provided to bonds issued
by Municipal Corporations subject to adherence to, inter alia, paragraph 110 of these
Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: bonds issued by Municipal Corporations subject to adherence to, inter alia, paragraph 110 of these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit policy of the AIFI shall incorporate suitable provisions for issue of PCE,
covering issues such as quantum of PCE, underwriting standards, assessment of risk,
pricing, setting limits, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: issue of PCE, covering issues such as quantum of PCE, underwriting standards, assessment of risk, pricing, setting

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCE shall be a subordinated facility provided in the form of an irrevocable contingent
line of credit which will be drawn in case of shortfall in cash flows for servicing the
bonds and thereby may improve the credit rating of the bond issue.
enriched_requirements.object: provided in the form of an irrevocable contingent line of credit which will be drawn in case of shortfall in cash flows for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The contingent
facility may, at the discretion of the PCE providing AIFI, be made available as a
revolving facility.
enriched_requirements.object: of the PCE providing AIFI, be made available as a revolving facility

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A clear agreement documenting all aspects of this arrangement shall be signed
between the promoter (bond issuer), the PCE providing AIFI, the bondholders (through
the Trustee) and all other lenders to the project.
enriched_requirements.object: promoter (bond issuer), the PCE providing AIFI, the bondholders (through the Trustee) and all other lenders to the project

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement to this effect shall be
in the nature of a legally binding contract.
enriched_requirements.object: of a legally binding contract

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The documentation for the facility shall clearly
define the circumstances under which the facility would be drawn upon.
enriched_requirements.object: under which the facility would be drawn upon

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The PCE exposure limit by a single AIFI shall be 50 per cent of the bond issue size.
enriched_requirements.object: of the bond issue size

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The PCE facility shall be provided at the time of the bond issue and shall be irrevocable.
enriched_requirements.object: time of the bond issue and shall be irrevocable

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As the purpose of PCE by AIFIs is to enable wide investor participation in the corporate
bond market, AIFIs shall not invest in corporate bonds which are credit enhanced by
any Regulated Entity of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: which are credit enhanced by any Regulated Entity of the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
They may, however, provide other need
based credit facilities (funded and / or non-funded) to the corporate / SPV.
enriched_requirements.object: need based credit facilities (funded and / or non-funded) to the corporate / SPV

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
AIFIs may offer PCE only in respect of bonds whose pre-enhanced rating are not lower
than "BBB" minus as issued by accredited External Credit Assessment Institutions
(ECAI).
enriched_requirements.object: respect of bonds whose pre-enhanced rating are not lower than "BBB" minus as issued by accredited External Credit Assessment Institu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To be eligible for PCE, corporate bonds shall be rated by a minimum of two ECAI at all
times.
enriched_requirements.object: minimum of two ECAI at all times

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The rating reports, both initial and subsequent, shall disclose both standalone credit
rating (i.e., rating without taking into account the effect of PCE) as well as the enhanced
credit rating (taking into account the effect of PCE).
enriched_requirements.object: rating (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCE shall be available only for servicing the bond and not for any other purpose
(such as funding acquisition of additional assets by the corporate, meeting part of the
project cost or meeting recurring expenses of the corporate or servicing other lenders
/ creditors to the project etc.), irrespective of the seniority of claims of other creditors in
relation to the bond holders.
enriched_requirements.object: servicing the bond and not for any other purpose (such as funding acquisition of additional assets by the corporate, meeting par

conditions: In case the PCE facility is partly drawn and interest accrues on the same
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the PCE facility is partly drawn and interest accrues on the same, the unpaid
accrued interest shall be excluded from the calculation of the remaining amount
available for drawing.
enriched_requirements.object: calculation of the remaining amount available for drawing

enriched_requirements.timeline: within 30 days from the date of its drawal
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping this aspect in view, a drawn tranche of the contingent PCE facility
shall be required to be repaid within 30 days from the date of its drawal (due date).
enriched_requirements.object: repaid within 30 days from the date of its drawal (due date)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
facility shall be treated as NPA if it remains outstanding for 90 days or more from the
due date and provided for as per the usual asset classification and provisioning norms.
enriched_requirements.object: if it remains outstanding for 90 days or more from the due date and provided for as per the usual asset classification and provision

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In that event, the AIFIs' other facilities to the borrower shall also be classified as NPA
as per extant guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA as per extant guidelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCE providing AIFI shall observe the following exposure limits:
(1) PCE exposure by a AIFI to a single counterparty or group of counterparties shall
be within the overall regulatory exposure limits applicable to the AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: limits: (1) PCE exposure by a AIFI to a single counterparty or group of counterparties shall be within the overall regu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The aggregate PCE exposure of a AIFI shall not exceed 20 per cent of its Tier 1
capital.
enriched_requirements.object: of its Tier 1 capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The tenor of the bond issued by NBFCs / HFCs for which PCE is provided shall not be
less than three years.
enriched_requirements.object: years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The proceeds from the bonds backed by PCE from AIFIs shall only be utilized for
refinancing the existing debt of the NBFCs / HFCs.
enriched_requirements.object: refinancing the existing debt of the NBFCs / HFCs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall introduce appropriate
mechanisms to monitor and ensure that the end-use condition is met.
enriched_requirements.object: monitor and ensure that the end-use condition is met

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The exposure of a AIFI by way of PCEs to bonds issued by each such NBFC / HFC
shall be restricted to one percent of capital funds of the AIFI within the extant single /
group borrower exposure limits.
enriched_requirements.object: percent of capital funds of the AIFI within the extant single / group borrower exposure limits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The effect of the PCE on the bond rating shall be disclosed in the bond offer
document i.e., the rating of the bond without and with the PCE shall be disclosed.
enriched_requirements.object: bond offer document i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
AIFI shall ensure that the project assets, created out of the bond issue for which
PCE has been provided by them, and the cash flows from the project are ring fenced
through an escrow account mechanism administered under a bond trustee
arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: assets, created out of the bond issue for which PCE has been provided by them, and the cash flows from the project are ring fe

conditions:
if any,
and the bonds and PCE
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The manner in which security interest in the project assets would be
shared by the lenders to the project, bond holders and AIFIs' providing the PCE and
the manner in which the project cash flows would be shared for servicing loans, if any,
and the bonds and PCE, shall be decided and agreed upon before the issue of bonds
and shall be properly documented.
enriched_requirements.object: upon before the issue of bonds and shall be properly documented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The project shall have a robust and viable financial structure even before the credit
enhancement is taken into account.
enriched_requirements.object: viable financial structure even before the credit enhancement is taken into account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Nevertheless, while providing PCE, RE shall
exercise necessary due diligence and credit appraisal, including making their own
internal credit analysis/ rating.
enriched_requirements.object: and credit appraisal, including making their own internal credit analysis/ rating

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
AIFI shall honour the full PCE commitment irrespective of the asset classification of
the concerned borrower's credit facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: commitment irrespective of the asset classification of the concerned borrower's credit facilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All extant regulatory prescriptions for credit and investment exposures by AIFI,
unless specified otherwise in this Direction, shall continue to apply.

For disclosure of the details of NFB credit facilities, the bank shall be guided by
Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions- Financial Statements:
Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions- Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
FEMA
8/2000-RB dated May 03, 2000;

Notwithstanding paragraph above, AIFI shall comply with all the related regulatory
norms including Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Concentration
Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: related regulatory norms including Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Concentration Risk Management) Direct

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall not provide finance to NBFCs for the following activities:
(1) Bills discounted / rediscounted by NBFCs except those arising from sale of
commercial vehicles including light commercial vehicles subject to normal lending
safeguards.
enriched_requirements.object: for the following activities: (1) Bills discounted / rediscounted by NBFCs except those arising from sale of commercial vehic

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall finance technically feasible, financially viable and bankable
infrastructure projects undertaken by both public sector and private sector
undertakings subject to the following conditions:
(1) An AIFI shall have the requisite expertise for appraising technical feasibility,
financial viability and bankability of projects, with particular reference to the risk
analysis and sensitivity analysis.
enriched_requirements.object: viable and bankable infrastructure projects undertaken by both public sector and private sector undertakings

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In respect of projects undertaken by public sector units, term loans shall be
sanctioned only for corporate entities (i.e., public sector undertakings registered
under Companies Act or a Corporation established under the relevant statute).
enriched_requirements.object: corporate entities (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, such term loans shall not be in lieu of or to substitute budgetary resources
envisaged for the project.
enriched_requirements.object: or to substitute budgetary resources envisaged for the project

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) While such public sector units may include Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs)
registered under the Companies Act, 2013 set up for financing infrastructure
projects, it shall be ensured by the bank that these loans / investments are not used
for financing the budget of the State Governments.
enriched_requirements.object: bank that these loans / investments are not used for financing the budget of the State Governments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Whether such financing is done by way of extending loans or investing in bonds,
the AIFI shall undertake due diligence on the viability and bankability of such
projects to ensure that revenue stream from the project is sufficient to take care of
the debt servicing obligations and that the repayment / servicing of debt is not out
of budgetary resources.
enriched_requirements.object: the viability and bankability of such projects to ensure that revenue stream from the project is sufficient to take care of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In the case of financing SPVs, banks and financial institutions shall ensure that the
funding proposals are for specific monitorable projects.
enriched_requirements.object: proposals are for specific monitorable projects

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The bank may also lend to SPVs in the private sector, registered under the
Companies Act, 2013 for directly undertaking infrastructure projects which are
financially viable and not for acting as mere financial intermediaries.
enriched_requirements.object: in the private sector, registered under the Companies Act, 2013 for directly undertaking infrastructure projects which are financial

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall
ensure that the bankruptcy or financial difficulties of the parent / sponsor shall not
affect the financial health of the SPV.
enriched_requirements.object: of the SPV

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to meet financial requirements of infrastructure projects, the AIFI shall
extend credit facility by way of working capital finance, term loan, project loan,
subscription to bonds and debentures / preference shares / equity shares acquired as
a part of the project finance package which is treated as "deemed advance" and any
other form of funded or non-funded facility.
enriched_requirements.object: way of working capital finance, term loan, project loan, subscription to bonds and debentures / preference shares / equity s

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions
- Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025 for instruction related to
take-out financing.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025 for instruction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The promoters' contribution towards the company's equity capital shall come from
their own resources and the AIFI shall generally avoid granting advances for the
acquisition of shares in other companies.
enriched_requirements.object: resources and the AIFI shall generally avoid granting advances for the acquisition of shares in other companies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, in view of the importance attached
to the infrastructure sector, under certain circumstances, an exception to this policy
may be made.

The AIFI may consider financing the acquisition of the promoters' shares
in an existing company, engaged in implementing or operating an infrastructure project
in India, subject to the following conditions
2 Deleted due to duplication
(1) The finance by AIFI shall be only for acquisition of shares of existing companies
providing infrastructure facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: of shares of existing companies providing infrastructure facilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, acquisition of such shares shall be in
respect of companies where the existing foreign promoters (and / or domestic joint
promoters) voluntarily propose to disinvest their majority shares in compliance with
SEBI guidelines, where applicable.
enriched_requirements.object: companies where the existing foreign promoters (and / or domestic joint promoters) voluntarily propose to disinvest their majority shares in compliance with SEBI guidelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The companies to which loans are extended shall, inter alia, have a satisfactory
net worth.
enriched_requirements.object: a satisfactory net worth

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The company financed and the promoters / directors of such companies shall not
be a defaulter to banks or financial institutions.
enriched_requirements.object: banks or financial institutions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In order to ensure that the borrower has a substantial stake in the infrastructure
company, finance by the AIFI shall be restricted to 50 per cent of the finance
required for acquiring the promoter's stake in the company being acquired.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of the finance required for acquiring the promoter's stake in the company being acquired

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Finance extended shall be against the security of the assets of the borrowing
company or the assets of the company acquired and not against the shares of that
company or the company being acquired.
enriched_requirements.object: of the assets of the borrowing company or the assets of the company acquired and not against the shares of that company or the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The shares of the borrower company /
company being acquired may be accepted as additional security and not as primary
security.
enriched_requirements.object: security and not as primary security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The security charged to the banks shall be marketable.
(6) The AIFI shall ensure maintenance of stipulated margins at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: margins at all times

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (7) The tenor of the loans shall not be longer than seven years.
enriched_requirements.object: years

conditions: where necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the Boards
of AIFI may make an exception in specific cases, where necessary, for financial
viability of the project.
enriched_requirements.object: specific cases

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) The AIFI financing acquisition of equity shares by promoters shall be within the
regulatory ceiling of 40 per cent of their net worth as on March 31 of the previous
year for the aggregate exposure of the banks to the capital markets in all forms
(both fund based and non- fund based).
enriched_requirements.object: ceiling of 40 per cent of their net worth as on March 31 of the previous year for the aggregate exposure of the banks to the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (9) The proposal for AIFI finance shall have the approval of the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of financing of infrastructure projects undertaken by Government owned
entities, the AIFI shall undertake due diligence on the viability of the projects.
enriched_requirements.object: the viability of the projects

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI
shall ensure that the individual components of financing and returns on the project are
well defined and assessed.
enriched_requirements.object: components of financing and returns on the project are well defined and assessed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
State Government guarantees shall not be taken as a
substitute for satisfactory credit appraisal and such appraisal requirements shall not be
diluted on the basis of any reported arrangement with the Reserve Bank or any bank
for regular standing instructions / periodic payment instructions for servicing the loans
/ bonds.
enriched_requirements.object: substitute for satisfactory credit appraisal and such appraisal requirements shall not be diluted on the basis of any reported arrangeme

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Financing of these projects shall, therefore, call for distinct appraisal methodology on
the part of lending agencies.
enriched_requirements.object: distinct appraisal methodology on the part of lending agencies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Identification of various project risks, evaluation of risk
mitigation through appraisal of project contracts and evaluation of creditworthiness of
the contracting entities and their abilities to fulfil contractual obligations shall be an
integral part of the appraisal exercise.
enriched_requirements.object: of the appraisal exercise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this connection, the bank shall consider
constituting appropriate screening committees / special cells for appraisal of credit
proposals and monitoring the progress / performance of the projects.
enriched_requirements.object: committees / special cells for appraisal of credit proposals and monitoring the progress / performance of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the participating AIFI shall, for the purpose of their own
assessment, refer to the appraisal report prepared by the lead bank or financial
institutions or have the project appraised jointly.
enriched_requirements.object: of their own assessment, refer to the appraisal report prepared by the lead bank or financial institutions or have the project appra

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For prudential credit exposure limits, the bank shall be guided by Reserve Bank of
India (All India Financial Institutions - Concentration Risk Management) Directions,
2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For assignment of risk weight for capital adequacy purposes, the bank shall be
guided by the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Prudential Norms
on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The long-term financing of infrastructure projects may lead to asset - liability
mismatches, particularly when such financing is not in conformity with the maturity
profile of a bank's liabilities.
enriched_requirements.object: liability mismatches, particularly when such financing is not in conformity with the maturity profile of a bank's liabilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall, therefore, exercise due caution on their
asset-liability position to ensure that they do not run into liquidity mismatches on
account of lending to such projects.
enriched_requirements.object: caution on their asset-liability position to ensure that they do not run into liquidity mismatches on account of lending to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall, therefore, clearly delineate
the procedure for approval of loan proposals and institute a suitable monitoring
mechanism for reviewing applications pending beyond the specified period.
enriched_requirements.object: the procedure for approval of loan proposals and institute a suitable monitoring mechanism for reviewing applications p

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Multiplicity
of appraisals by every institution involved in financing, leading to delays, has to be
avoided and the bank shall be prepared to broadly accept technical parameters laid
down by leading public financial institutions.
enriched_requirements.object: accept technical parameters laid down by leading public financial institutions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the AIFI shall not grant any advance against rights issues irrespective
of the source of repayment of such advance.
enriched_requirements.object: rights issues irrespective of the source of repayment of such advance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that this shall not be applicable in cases where the other lending
institution faces temporary liquidity constraints on account of restrictions prescribed
by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: where the other lending institution faces temporary liquidity constraints on account of restrictions prescribed by the Reserve

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These restrictions shall also be applicable to the subsidiaries of an AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: the subsidiaries of an AIFI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
AIFIs are permitted to lend to InvITs subject to putting in place a Board-approved
policy on exposures to InvITs which shall inter alia cover the appraisal mechanism,
sanctioning conditions, internal limits, monitoring mechanism, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: appraisal mechanism, sanctioning conditions, internal limits, monitoring mechanism, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the AIFI shall undertake assessment of all critical parameters including
sufficiency of cash flows at InvIT level to ensure timely debt servicing.
enriched_requirements.object: critical parameters including sufficiency of cash flows at InvIT level to ensure timely debt servicing

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that the overall leverage of the InvITs and the underlying SPVs put
together shall be within the permissible leverage as per the Board-approved policy of
the AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: leverage as per the Board-approved policy of the AIFI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that as InvITs are trusts, the AIFI shall keep in mind the legal
provisions in respect of these entities especially those regarding enforcement of
security.
enriched_requirements.object: legal provisions in respect of these entities especially those regarding enforcement of security

conditions: where none of the underlying SPVs
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
AIFIs shall lend to only those InvITs where none of the underlying SPVs, which have
existing loans, is facing 'financial difficulty' as defined in the Reserve Bank of India (All
India Financial Institutions- Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: InvITs where none of the underlying SPVs, which have existing loans, is facing 'financial difficulty' as defined in the Reserve Ban

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall monitor performance of the underlying SPVs on an ongoing basis as
ability of the InvITs to meet their debt obligation will largely depend on the performance
of these SPVs.
enriched_requirements.object: underlying SPVs on an ongoing basis as ability of the InvITs to meet their debt obligation will largely depend on the perfo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Audit Committee of the Board of the AIFI shall review the compliance to the
above conditions on a half yearly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: the above conditions on a half yearly basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
AIFIs shall determine interest rate on export credit as per the policy approved by
their Board, subject to the extant regulatory provisions.
enriched_requirements.object: export credit as per the policy approved by their Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

Trade Relief Measures
To mitigate the burden of debt servicing brought about by trade disruptions caused by
global headwinds and to ensure the continuity of viable businesses, AIFIs extending
export credit finance may provide relief measures to eligible borrowers, as specified
under Reserve Bank of India (Trade Relief Measures) Directions, 2025 dated
November 14, 2025.
